datasetAgreementGeneral: This dataset originates from the National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases. It contains diagnostic measurements from female patients of Pima Indian heritage aged at least 21. Access is for research and educational purposes only.
term1: You acknowledge that this dataset is intended solely for diabetes diagnosis research and related academic purposes.
term2: You agree not to use this dataset for any commercial, non-research, or unauthorised purposes.
term3: You agree not to make any claims about the Pima Indian population based solely on this dataset without appropriate scientific justification.
term4: You must properly attribute the National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases in all related publications and reports.
term5: You accept full responsibility for ensuring the ethical use of this dataset in compliance with all applicable institutional and national regulations.
